title: How to get ChatGPT-5 to analyse your Nasdaq chart in seconds (MT5)
transcript: Did you know that you can upload a screenshot of your NASDAQ trading chart and have Chad GBT5 perform a technical analysis on it? In this video, we'll walk you through exactly how to prepare your chart, upload it correctly, and request the type of analysis you need. Step one is to take a clear screenshot of your NASDAQ index chart on MT5. To get the best results, your image [music] needs to be clear, complete, and show all key information. The full price chart including the most recent candles, ideally capturing the latest swing high or low around a major level, the time frame, the symbol clearly showing NAS [music] 100, US 100 or similar that represents the NASDAQ index, and any indicators you want the AI to interpret. For example, 20 to 50 period EMAs for trend [music] direction and RSI for momentum. Make sure the zoom level captures the full current move. Not too zoomed in that it only shows intraday noise, and not too zoomed out that the short-term trend disappears. If you're asking for pattern analysis, include enough historical candles to show the full information of patterns like double tops, ascending candles, or flag consolidations, which can [music] be common on the NASDAQ index. For candlestick analysis, make sure at least the last 20 to 30 candles are visible. [music] Step two is to supply your screenshot to the AI platform. You can do this by dropping or pasting your screenshot into the chat or by clicking the image upload button. Step three is to ask what kind of analysis you want. You can be as broad or as specific as you like. Examples include, can you perform a technical analysis of this chart and tell me what you're seeing? Can you identify any candlestick or chart patterns? [music] Can you highlight the current trend and any major support or resistance levels? You can then ask follow-up questions after the initial analysis. For example, once it has identified support and resistance zones, you could ask which levels look stronger based on recent price action, what would confirm a breakout or reversal here? Can you suggest where a stop loss might logically go based on the setup? Each follow-up refineses the analysis further, helping you move from a general overview to a more actionable trading perspective. That said, while AI tools can help you interpret charts and spot patterns quickly, they're not a substitute for personal judgment. Always double check any levels or setups before acting on them. And remember, no AI can predict markets with certainty, [music] and not every AI interprets charts the same way. We tested this in another video comparing how five AI platforms identified [music] key price zones and interpreted indicators like Fibonacci sequences and bowlinger bands. If you want to see which model generated the better technical analysis, check out that comparison next.
